description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a broad, low-pitched hip roof covered in brown shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color, complemented by wooden trim and a wooden deck area at the front entrance. Large windows are present, including a prominent bay window on the front facade, allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. The house sits on a rectangular grassy plot, bordered by a simple fence on one side. The rear and side elevations are more solid, with fewer windows and minimal ornamentation. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for suburban or residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story beige bungalow with a hip roof, wooden trim, and a prominent bay window on the front, set on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wooden deck, and a large bay window.
description_view_1: Side view revealing grouped windows and the continuation of the wooden trim and fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view with a solid wall, minimal windows, and a glimpse of the fence and yard.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the plain rear facade and the hip roof's full span.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with bay window on front facade
